title: aspalathus rubens
intro: Aspalathus rubens, also known as rooibos, is a type of plant native to South Africa that belongs to the legume family. It is a shrub-like plant with needle-like leaves that is traditionally harvested to make a caffeine-free herbal tea, known for its medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of rooibos include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing the risk of certain cancers and improving heart health. Rooibos tea is often prepared by infusing the dried leaves in hot water, and it can also be found in various herbal preparations, including capsules and tinctures.
